commit_scope: Admit non-recursive pure call-let snapshotting and the ephemeris-planets band to the fourth arm.

commands: coord claim "fourth-pure-call-let-snapshot: fix non-recursive pure call-let double-read divergence; reproducer ephemeris-planets-band; avoid HTTP/witness/BML lanes"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/guidance-channel.fk form-stdlib/celestial-pole-channel.fk form-stdlib/trig.fk form-stdlib/ephemeris-sun.fk form-stdlib/ephemeris-planets.fk form-stdlib/tests/ephemeris-planets-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh ephemeris-planets let-effect-once write-file-text
local_validation.notes: Before the fix, the fourth-arm survey row for ephemeris-planets read `multi-mismatch 1111111 101111`. After non-recursive direct-call let snapshotting and the fkwu RAM widening, the survey row reads `multi-pass 1111111 1111111`. Focused manifest validation and the full suite are expected to report ephemeris-planets four-way and 210 four-way bands.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form lowering/fourth-arm floor slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Non-recursive direct-call do-lets lower through a single store/load snapshot so list-returning calls can be read repeatedly without re-walking. Recursive scopes keep pure inline lowering.

phase_gate.gate: List-returning pure calls must be readable more than once on fkwu without re-walking before ephemeris and similar numeric/list recipes can join the fourth floor.
phase_gate.next: Continue the 183/585 family ratchet with another non-overlapping fourth-arm residual cluster after CI merge.
